text: Hi, good morning. This is Evelyn. So I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through North Carolina State Relief Program. So have you been notified about these benefits yet? Yes. So I was asking if you received the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan.
